summary: AI with a visual and interactive interface Discussion | Link
content: We want to share our new iOS App. Ask anything and Monogram responds with a visual, interactive interface instead of a wall of text. We created a technology that generates an entire user interface on the fly, in just a few seconds. With a consistent and crafted user experience. We designed Monogram for everyday use cases, whether you’re looking for something to watch, finding a recipe, planning a trip, or anything else on your mind.
chineseSummary: 具有可视化和交互界面的人工智能讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 我们想分享我们新的 iOS 应用程序。询问任何问题，Monogram 都会通过可视化的交互式界面而不是文字墙进行响应。我们创建了一种技术，可以在短短几秒钟内动态生成整个用户界面。具有一致且精心设计的用户体验。我们为日常使用场景设计了 Monogram，无论您是在寻找值得观看的内容、寻找食谱、计划旅行还是您想到的其他任何事情。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
